name: fastmail-mcp
description: Unofficial MCP server for Fastmail API integration (not affiliated with or endorsed by Fastmail)

fastmail_api_token.title: Fastmail API Token
fastmail_api_token.description: Fastmail API token (Settings → Privacy & Security → API tokens)

fastmail_base_url.title: Fastmail Base URL
fastmail_base_url.description: Fastmail API base URL (leave default unless using a custom endpoint)

fastmail_download_dir.title: Attachment Download Directory
fastmail_download_dir.description: Directory for saving email attachments (defaults to ~/Downloads/fastmail-mcp/). Path traversal protection is enforced within this directory.

fastmail_caldav_username.title: CalDAV Username
fastmail_caldav_username.description: Fastmail account email, for calendar tools via CalDAV (optional)

fastmail_caldav_password.title: CalDAV App Password
fastmail_caldav_password.description: App-specific password with Calendars scope (Settings -> Privacy & Security -> App passwords). Optional; calendar tools are disabled without it.

fastmail_caldav_display_name.title: CalDAV Display Name
fastmail_caldav_display_name.description: Display name used as ORGANIZER when creating calendar events with participants (defaults to the CalDAV username)

fastmail_webdav_url.title: WebDAV Storage URL
fastmail_webdav_url.description: HTTPS base URL of a WebDAV collection for save_attachment_to_webdav (e.g. https://myfiles.fastmail.com/ for Fastmail Files, or a Nextcloud files URL). Optional.

fastmail_webdav_username.title: WebDAV Username
fastmail_webdav_username.description: Username for the WebDAV storage server (for Fastmail Files: your account email)

fastmail_webdav_password.title: WebDAV App Password
fastmail_webdav_password.description: App password for the WebDAV storage server (for Fastmail Files: an app password with the Files scope)
